visual: Black-to-live system boot; Sentinel control hub lights up; log stream, sensor pulses, and alert nodes synchronize.
subtitle_cn: 这不是报表系统，而是农业决策生命体。
vo_en: This is not reporting software. This is a living agricultural decision OS.
sfx: low pulse drone, UI boot chime, subtle data ticks

visual: Rapid dashboard motion design; environment, pest, and yield-risk layers animate in one frame.
subtitle_cn: 它每秒都在感知、判断、校验与学习。
vo_en: Every second, Sentinel senses, reasons, validates, and learns.
sfx: rhythmic electronic pulse, fast UI whooshes

visual: Risk trend lifts before incident; system enters pre-incident battle mode; watchdog pre-plan trigger animation.
subtitle_cn: 风险尚未发生，系统已提前主动防御。
vo_en: Before incidents happen, Sentinel is already in proactive defense mode.

visual: AI collaboration topology: Agronomist, Compliance, and CFO nodes exchange high-speed packets and converge on one recommendation.
subtitle_cn: 不是单点 AI，而是可协作、可审计的智能组织。
vo_en: Not a single model, but a coordinated and auditable AI organization.

visual: Execution command center: drone arc routing, human-team PDA order receipt, and external vendor API green-light sequence.
subtitle_cn: 无人机、设备、人力与供应链一次性协同激活。
vo_en: Drones, machines, human teams, and external supply chain resources are activated in one orchestration layer.
sfx: tempo lift, route sweep, dispatch beeps

visual: Before/after compare board: risk down, audit loop closed, Grade A ratio up, profit curve rising.
subtitle_cn: 把风险变成可管理变量，把品质变成 Grade A 溢价。
vo_en: Turn risk into a manageable variable, and quality into Grade A premium value.

visual: Brand lockup: Sentinel logo + three core KPIs + dual CTA for pilot and investment/channel partnerships.
subtitle_cn: Sentinel：让农业从不确定，走向确定性增长。
vo_en: Sentinel makes agriculture transition from uncertainty to deterministic growth.
